title: FMD - Both earbuds connected - Play button
scenario: Verify that playing and stopping a tone on both connected Osprey earbuds via Find My Device works correctly, with proper map recognition, tone playback, and state restoration.
steps: Open Lens app with Osprey device connected
expected: After step 3, Osprey device is recognized on the map as one device. After step 7, tone is played on both earbuds with flashing lights, "Sending tone..." message is shown with an animated stop button and illustration. After step 8, state returns to same as after step 4.
